item.title: about
item.description: About I am building a technical portfolio focused on practical work across cybersecurity, cloud infrastructure, and Microsoft 365 administration.

item.title: Braindump
item.description: This section is my personal technical knowledge base.

item.title: contact
item.description: Contact If you would like to connect or review my work, the best places to reach me are below.

item.title: Home
item.description: Professional Summary I am building a focused technical portfolio to document practical work in security monitoring, cloud automation, and Microsoft 365 administration.

item.title: cloud-lab
item.description: Dual-Cloud Serverless Deployment with Terraform Role Fit This project is best aligned with junior Cloud Engineer roles that mention AWS or Azure exposure, infrastructure as code, CI/CD, and troubleshooting.

item.title: Projects
item.description: Projects This portfolio currently highlights three selected technical projects.

item.title: m365-lab
item.description: Microsoft 365 Joiner, Mover, Leaver and Endpoint Onboarding Lab Role Fit This project is best aligned with Microsoft 365, IT Support, and Modern Workplace roles.

item.title: soc-lab
item.description: Home SOC Lab Role Fit This project is best aligned with SOC Analyst and Security Analyst roles.
